full_text:
Sun Guan (Zhongtai) 孫觀 (仲臺)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Guan (孫觀), styledZhongtai (仲臺), was born in Taishan. Second only to Zang Ba, followed him across the land. Wounded while fighting Sun Quan. Sun Guan was affiliated with Lu Bu and the Wei Kingdom. Sun Guan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
